title: Metro+
description: A Train Mod containing everything you need to get started on transportation!
body:
# Metro+
![The train has a sleek, futuristic design with visible headlights and a digital destination display on the front. The surrounding environment includes rails, iron fencing, and vegetation, giving the scene the appearance of a train station set within a forest or rural area.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db75c649ae6b83cf553c4c3a0b6196d69f1e86fe.png)
### General Rundown:
This Is a transportation mod, contains trains, boats, planes, cablecars, cars (Removed Temporarily), and a whole lot more stuff (Incudes but not limited to decoration mods). This mod is pre-optimized for your convinience for if you have a bad computer, it does include some shaders right off the bat. Last But not least this mod includes quality of life changes to minecraft that improve gameplay expirience.

### Features:
- Shaders ("OMG So unoriginal!?!?!" i know)
- Minecraft Transit Railway ("You Stole That!?!" simply put in a modpack)
- Pre-Optimized ("How Dare you optimize **MY GAME**!?" optimized for people who have potatos for PC's like me)
- A Few Quality Of life Mods To Improve Overall The Expirence.

### Known Issues/Incompatible Mods:
- ```kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric``` causes falling through the world more than before.
- On versions older than ```1.1.x``` It was possible to fall through the world off spawn, chunk loading error, Leave and rejoin. (Fixes it most of the time)
- ```Tape Stop``` Causes Major Instability within the renderer.
- ```Chunkumulator``` Causes World Loading Crashes **(Potentialy incorrect)**
- On Versions ```1.0.6``` Or older, falling blocks will crash your game on select devices. (Fixed on ```1.0.7``` Or later)
- Hosting **Big** worlds using ```Essentials``` on **Bad Hardware** does cause **game instability, crashes, and world corruption**. ( **Most** instability issues Have been fixed on versions ```1.1.3``` Or newer )
- Bugged F3 Menu on ```1.1.3``` Or newer, Move arround and it fixes it's self.
- Bugged F3 Menu on ```1.1.3``` Or newer causes minimap projection corruption, simply move arround and it fixes it's self. ( Your world data is not affected )
- **Switching Modpack Versions Can Cause World Corruption**.
- On versions prior to ```1.1.7``` It was possible for world generation to get stuck and cause a memory leak, it has been fixed on ```1.1.7``` or newer.

### Extra Need To Know Stuff:
- Use ```localhost:8888``` In A Web Browser In Singleplayer To Open A Dynamic Train Map in singleplayer or if hosting.
- To Use The Dynamic Train map In Multi-Player Use ```<Server-IP>:<Port>``` .
- Use ```Mod Menu``` For Customizing Any mods.
- Removed ```Treps cars``` on versions ```1.1.0``` Or newer temporarily as it caused major instability.
- If You want to use ```Essentials``` you have to install it seperatly (I somewhat dislike their practices)
- No Promises For next updates ( I do this as a hobby )
- Recomended Version to download as of last description update ```1.2.1```.
- Description Last Updated on ```2/8/26``` And Or ```1.2.1```
